name: knox
description: Security enforcement layer for Claude Code. Blocks dangerous commands, audits every tool call, detects prompt injection.

preset_paranoid.title: Paranoid (Max)
preset_paranoid.description: Strict + interactive approval (ask-not-deny) on every block. Highest precedence — wins over any other preset that's also checked.

preset_strict.title: Strict
preset_strict.description: Standard + path protection + full sudo block. Wins over standard / minimal / disabled if multiple are checked.

preset_standard.title: Standard (recommended)
preset_standard.description: Default. Blocks pipe-to-shell, bash -c, eval, exfiltration. Sanitizes sudo. Wins over minimal / disabled.

preset_minimal.title: Minimal
preset_minimal.description: Only blocks miners, destruction, and self-protection violations. Wins over disabled.

preset_disabled.title: Disabled (audit-only)
preset_disabled.description: No enforcement. Self-protection rules and audit logging stay on. Lowest precedence — any other preset that's also checked wins.

webhook.title: Webhook URL
webhook.description: Webhook URL for security alerts (optional, leave blank to skip)

audit_path.title: Audit Log Path
audit_path.description: Audit log directory path (leave blank for default: ~/.local/share/knox/audit)
